generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring vehicle speed, position, and other state parameters"
]

instance MotorActuatorFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring motor actuation feedback (e.g., position or current)"
]

instance SteeringServoFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring steering servo position feedback"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorActuationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorActuatorFeedbackSensor
]

instance SteeringServoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoFeedbackSensor
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed, position, and other state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorActuationFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor actuation feedback data including position and current"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorActuationDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo position feedback data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated from LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving paths for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering and Tracking processing for LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARRawData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data translation, serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProjectedDrivingPathData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC computation offloading from vehicle ECUs to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC system via operator commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service displaying real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, and allows saving and generating reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, SaveReportAction, GenerateReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading service for ACC system handling lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service enabling operators to remotely enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state data"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving paths for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from LiDAR point cloud clustering"
]

instance SaveReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save generated reports from monitoring data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate reports from monitoring data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lead vehicle detection for ACC system"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Speed calculation based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of actuation commands for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data and control mechanisms"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity with 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent for remote management"
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity environment containing 3D Visualization and Control Panel"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., ACC-related signals) from the ACC Controlling FE are transmitted to Motor and Steering Servo actuators via Wi-Fi UDP. The Data Translation component handles serialization and unit conversions for control messages."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading due to hardware limitations, which is less stringent than safety-critical vehicular standards mandating stricter synchronization (<100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA standards, implemented via ROS2 where each Functional Entity (FE) is encapsulated as an individual ROS2 package containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The Physical Twin Entity, a deviation from ISO 23247's OME, hosts general automotive functionality such as Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, with all entities deployed on distinct hardware and coordinated through ROS2 communication channels."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-component communication uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication (Physical, Digital, User) occurs over Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-2:2021 defines a reference architecture with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) perform tasks such as actuating OME, data transformation, and user interfacing; implementation details are not specified by the standard, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as a potential technology choice."
]
